mapper.select: select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, exetype, seq, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, pre_owner, pre_table_name, update_cols, pagitypedetail from cotdl.tbl_piiupload_template order by jobid, version, stepid, seq
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piiupload_template (jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, exetype, seq, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, pre_owner, pre_table_name, update_cols, pagitypedetail) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq}, #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt}, #{commitcnt}, #{pre_owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pre_table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{update_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
update cotdl.tbl_piiupload_template set
db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, owner= #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_name= #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exetype= #{exetype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pk_col= #{pk_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_col= #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where_key_name= #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parallelcnt= #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, commitcnt= #{commitcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pre_owner= #{pre_owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pre_table_name= #{pre_table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_cols= #{update_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pagitypedetail= #{pagitypedetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and seq= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, exetype, seq, pk_col, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, commitcnt, pre_owner, pre_table_name, update_cols, pagitypedetail from cotdl.tbl_piiupload_template
order by jobid, version, stepid, seq
